name: Wheels Up Experience Inc.
business: Wheels Up is a leading global provider of on-demand private aviation, offering a membership program and charter solutions. The company generates the majority of its revenue from member and customer flights, and has a partnership with Delta Air Lines.
sellsTo: customers with specialized needs like musicians, entertainers, athletes and business executives

exposures.sentence: Wheels Up is a leading global provider of on-demand private aviation with a large, diverse aircraft fleet and a network of safety-vetted charter operators, all committed to safety and service.

catalysts.event: Launch of Wheels Up Signature Membership
catalysts.sentence: In early September 2025, we launched the Wheels Up Signature Membership, an evolution enabled by our fleet modernization strategy that provides members access to our Bombardier Challenger 300 series and Embraer Phenom 300 series aircraft.

catalysts.event: First Bombardier Challenger 300 series aircraft introduced into controlled fleet
catalysts.sentence: in April 2025, we introduced our first Bombardier Challenger 300 series aircraft into our controlled fleet

catalysts.event: Retirement of Cessna Citation CJ3 fleet from revenue service
catalysts.sentence: in June 2025, we retired our legacy Cessna Citation CJ3 fleet from revenue service and in the fourth quarter of 2025, returned the last leased Citation CJ3 to its lessor

catalysts.event: Retirement of Cessna Citation Excel and XLS fleet from revenue service
catalysts.sentence: in November 2025, we retired our Cessna Citation Excel and XLS fleet from revenue service and sold our owned aircraft of those models to an unrelated third-party buyer.
in December 2025, we closed a sale-leaseback transaction with an institutional capital provider for three Bombardier Challenger 300 series and seven Embraer Phenom 300 series premium jets.

catalysts.event: Extension of Revolving Credit Facility availability period to September 20, 2026
catalysts.sentence: Delta extended the period during which the $100.0 million Revolving Credit Facility is available to be drawn to September 20, 2026.

catalysts.event: Expectation to substantially complete fleet modernization by end of 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to substantially complete our current fleet modernization strategy by the end of 2026, which is ahead of our original mid-2027 estimate.

catalysts.event: Entry into ATM Equity Offering Program for up to $50 million
catalysts.sentence: On August 29, 2025, we entered into an ATM Equity Offering SM Sales Agreement with BofA Securities, Inc. and Jefferies LLC, pursuant to which we may sell, from time to time, up to an aggregate sales price of $50.0 million of our Class A common stock.

catalysts.event: Announcement of unification of global private jet sales teams under Wheels Up brand
catalysts.sentence: In the first quarter of 2026, we announced the unification of our global private jet sales teams under the Wheels Up brand to provide a more streamlined, customer-centric, end-to-end aviation experience.

catalysts.event: Targeted annual cash cost savings of $70 million, with full impact expected in Q3 2026
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we increased our estimate of the annual cash cost savings from $50 million to $70 million due to additional savings measures identified.
